features: ⏱️ Temporal delay attributes on connections (immediate, short-term, medium-term, long-term)
📊 Delay category and years stored in adjacency matrix cells
🔗 Dash-pattern edge visualization for delay categories in network diagrams
📝 Connection review UI with delay toggle, category dropdown, and years input
📥 Excel/Kumu import reads Delay columns when present, skips gracefully when absent
📤 Excel/Kumu export includes Delay and Delay (years) columns
🌍 Delay translation keys for all 9 languages
🔄 Backward-compatible: old numeric lag format auto-migrated to delay categories

improvements.issue: Old numeric lag format in adjacency cells not human-readable
improvements.resolution: Auto-migrated to named delay categories via derive_delay_category()

migration_notes: No breaking changes - fully backward-compatible with v1.8.x data
Old Excel files without Delay columns load without modification
Old adjacency matrix cells (+strength:confidence) parsed with delay=NA
Old numeric lag format (+strength:confidence:years) auto-converted to delay category
developer_notes: Delay constants defined in constants.R: DELAY_CATEGORIES, DELAY_DEFAULTS
parse_connection_value() returns delay and delay_years fields
derive_delay_category() converts numeric years to named categories
delay_to_dashes() converts delay category to visNetwork dash array
Connection review module uses delay toggle with conditional UI
deployment_notes: New translation keys in labels.json and connection_review.json
Translation cache regenerates automatically on first startup
